# Holiday Extras APIConnect (Partner API v2)

> REST API for partners integrating with Holiday Extras travel services. OAuth 2.0 authenticated, OpenAPI-defined, product-centric design covering parking (with more products coming).

## Getting Started

- [APIConnect Overview](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/): Platform introduction and documentation index
- [Authentication](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/authentication/): OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow, token lifecycle, rate limits, revocation
- [API Endpoint Navigation Guide](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/api-endpoint-navigation-guide/): Full customer journey — discovery, search, book, amend, cancel with workflow examples
- [OpenAPI Schema](https://api-sandbox.holidayextras.com/partner-api/v2/schema.json): Machine-readable API specification

## Guides

- [Event Notifications (Webhooks)](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/webhook-integration-guide/): Real-time booking status notifications, signature verification, payload structure

## Error Reference

- [Bad Request](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/bad-request/)
- [Conflict](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/conflict/)
- [Internal Error](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/internal-error/)
- [Method Not Allowed](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/method-not-allowed/)
- [Not Acceptable](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/not-acceptable/)
- [Resource Not Found](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/resource-not-found/)
- [Too Early](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/too-early/)
- [Unprocessable Entity](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/unprocessable-entity/)
- [Unsupported Media Type](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/unsupported-media-type/)
- [Bad Gateway](https://docs.holidayextras.co.uk/partner/v2/problems/bad-gateway/)
